title: Madonna of the Streets
writer: Frank Griffin, Fanny Hatton, Frederic Hatton
actors: Alla Nazimova, Milton Sills, Claude Gillingwater
plot: John Morton, director of the fashionable parish of St. Andrews, resigns his wealthy charge to open a mission in the Limehouse district of London. His uncle, dying, leaves penniless his mistress, Mary Carlson, who determines to go ...
